title: Vikram Title Song Lyrics Tamil
stanzas:
raatchasa raaman ena
kanavai kondavan ivanthaney
ennuvathey mogam
ennuvathey mogam

ivan varalaarum
oru ugam vaazhum
ivna kalaithaalum
or vidayaagum

ivan adaiyaalam
adhu kadalaagum
pala por vendra
orr peyaraagum

Naayagan meendum varraar
ettuthikkum bayanthaaney
ennuvathey mogam
ennuvathey mogam

raatchasa raaman ena
kanavai kondavan ivanthaney
ennuvathey mogam
ennuvathey mogam

yemane ethirthum

tamilStanzas:
நாயகன் மீண்டும் வர்ரார்
எட்டு திக்கும் பயம்தானே
எண்ணுவதே மோகம்
எண்ணுவதே மோகம்

ராட்சச ராமன் என  
கனவை கொண்டவன் இவன்தானே
எண்ணுவதே மோகம்
எண்ணுவதே மோகம்

இவன் அடையாளம்
அது கடலாகும்
பல போர் வென்ற
ஓர் பெயராகும்

நாயகன் மீண்டும் வர்ரார்
எட்டு திக்கும் பயம்தானே
எண்ணுவதே மோகம்
எண்ணுவதே மோகம்

ராட்சச ராமன் என
கனவை கொண்டவன் இவன்தானே
எண்ணுவதே மோகம்
எண்ணுவதே மோகம்

பல வாழ் துளைத்தாலும்
இவன் கிழியவில்லை
எமனே எதிர்த்தும்
இவன் அடங்கவில்லை

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song?

The song conveys themes of power and resilience, reflecting the protagonist's journey in the movie.

How does this song fit into the movie's plot?

This title track serves as an introduction to the character's strength and sets the tone for the film's action-packed narrative.

Who is the singer and music director of the song?

The song is sung and composed by Anirudh, who is known for his dynamic music style.

When was the song released?

The song was released on May 18, 2022.
enrichedMetadata.summary: The Vikram Title Song serves as a powerful introduction to the film Vikram, showcasing the protagonist's formidable presence. With its energetic beats and motivational lyrics, the song evokes a sense of excitement and anticipation. It captures the essence of the character's journey, emphasizing themes of strength and resilience. This track is not just a song; it's an anthem that resonates with the film's high-stakes narrative.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Vikram Title Song is a high-octane anthem that perfectly encapsulates the essence of the film Vikram. With Anirudh's electrifying vocals and powerful beats, this track is designed to get your adrenaline pumping. Experience the thrill and intensity that sets the tone for an unforgettable cinematic journey!
stanzaMeanings: The hero is coming back, he is the one who brings fear, this is my pride, this is my pride.
He is called the demon king, he is the one who has dreams, this is my pride, this is my pride.
His past is a story, he lives in a way that is unique, he can either create or destroy.
His presence is powerful, he is a name that brings many battles.
Let's begin, Vikram, Vikram, Vikram, Vikram, Vikram, Vikram, Vikram, Vikram.
This is my pride, this is my pride, this is my pride, this is my pride.
The hero is coming back, he is the one who brings fear, this is my pride, this is my pride.
He is called the demon king, he is the one who has dreams, this is my pride, this is my pride.
Even if he falls, he rises like a mountain, he is a leader, a true warrior.
He does not bend under many paths, even if he is pushed, he does not give up.
No one like him lives here, no one can match his strength.
Let's begin, Vikram, Vikram, Vikram, Vikram, Vikram, Vikram, Vikram, Vikram.
